title: Hey Joe
why_this_song: Hey Joe by Jimi Hendrix (1966) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Where you going with that gun in your hand?"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I heard you shot your woman down"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "You know, I caught her messing around with another man"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I'm going down to shoot my old lady"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You know, I caught her messing around with another man"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Where you going with that gun in your hand?
I said, where you going with that gun in your hand?
Yes I did, I shot her
You know, I caught her messing around, messing around town
Yes I did, I shot her
You know, I caught my old lady messing around town

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "going" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "going" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shot" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm going down to shoot my old lady

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Hey Joe" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Hey Joe" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Hey Joe" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Hey Joe"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Jimi Hendrix one question about "Hey Joe", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Jimi Hendrix sobre "Hey Joe", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
